source.notes: Desktop contract plus mobile adaptation rules observed from the Figma design system, including fully collapsed bottom-sheet and selected-marker detail states.
source.pageName: 地图类型模板&组件&说明✅

desktop.layoutModel: full-window map canvas with fixed left control panel and bottom action overlay

mobile.layoutModel: map modal with host mobile header, sheet-owned select/list/footer, and independent search overlay
mobile.mobileHeader: x=0, y=0, w=375, h=92; host shell chrome, not data generated content
mobile.bottomSheet: default: x=0, y=400, w=375, h=320, top radius=12; fully collapsed: x=0, y=620, w=375, h=100
mobile.dragHandle: sheet x=16, y=12, w=343, h=4; visible bar 44x4 centered, radius=999
mobile.controls: sheet-owned select x=16, y=28, w=343, h=42; SearchBar is not sheet-owned

states.default: MobileMapDefaultScreen: BottomSheet x=0, y=400, w=375, h=320; SearchBar overlay x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36; footer visible.
states.bottomSheetCollapsed: MobileMapBottomSheetCollapsedScreen: BottomSheet x=0, y=620, w=375, h=100; handle and map select remain visible; SearchBar stays as MapCollectionModal overlay at x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36; list is clipped; footer hidden.
states.markerSelected: MobileMapMarkerSelectedScreen: MapImage x=37, y=107, w=307, h=410; selected marker x=163, y=315, w=40, h=46; SearchBar overlay remains x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36; DescribeCard x=16, y=602, w=343, h=86; BottomSheet hidden while detail card is open.
states.bottomSheetExpanded: MobileMapBottomSheetExpandedScreen: BottomSheet x=0, y=68, w=375, h=652; Select x=16, y=28; SearchBar overlay x=16, y=52; SheetItemList x=16, y=82; footer visible at y=628.
states.searchFocused: MobileMapSearchFocusedScreen: BottomSheet x=0, y=68, w=375, h=652; SearchBar overlay focused at x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36; footer omitted in observed state.

mobile.collapsedBottomSheet: MobileMapBottomSheetCollapsedScreen: BottomSheet x=0, y=620, w=375, h=100; DragHandle x=16,y=12,w=343,h=4; Select x=16,y=28,w=343,h=42; list content is clipped; footer hidden.
mobile.searchOverlay: Form.SearchBar x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36 in MapCollectionModal overlay across default, bottomSheetCollapsed, markerSelected, bottomSheetExpanded, and searchFocused states; do not nest it inside BottomSheet.

responsiveRules.themeRule: Use dark map tokens by default. If a future token export provides explicit light/dark selectors, mount the map container under the host-selected mode instead of duplicating token values.

regions.purpose: 按地图模板预留游戏 Logo 图片区域，不渲染普通文字标题。
承载地图筛选、搜索和分类入口。

layout.sidebar: desktop: x=12, y=12, w=264, h=776, radius=8
layout.scroll: desktop: Layout.Scroll instance x=252, y=102, w=12, h=586 inside Panel Content
layout.mobileReplacement: mobile uses bottom-sheet.controls and bottom-sheet.list; do not render the desktop left sidebar on mobile

regions.purpose: 作为贯穿整个弹窗的底层地图画布，展示地图底图、点位和地图交互层；Sidebar 与 Footer 叠在其上方。
pendingDataBoundElements: map background image or tile layer

layout.canvas: desktop: x=0, y=0, w=1160, h=800; mobile modal canvas starts at x=0, y=92 inside the 375x812 screen
layout.observedMapImage: desktop: x=421, y=46, w=529, h=708; mobile: x=37, y=88, w=307, h=410 inside MapCollectionModal
layout.observedMapTipInstance: desktop: x=658, y=386, w=32, h=38; mobile examples stay 32x38 and anchor by bottom-center tail point
layout.zoomControls: desktop: x=1112, y=12, w=36, h=64; mobile zoom controls omitted unless host renderer has a compact control pattern

regions.purpose: 展示选中点位或对象的说明信息。

layout.describeCard: x=868, y=522, w=280, h=266; fixed to the lower-right of the 1160 x 800 map template

regions.purpose: Figma 中的 Windows 窗口最小化、最大化、关闭示意，不属于 H5 页面内组件。
承载地图页面的主要行动按钮；地图类型 v0 中用于取消所有筛选。
Mobile status bar and title bar shell from MobileHeader. Host app should own this shell; AI page output must not invent title/status data.
Mobile sheet-owned map select control. SearchBar is modeled separately as mobile.search-overlay and must not be nested inside BottomSheet.

layout.bottomSheet: default x=0, y=400, w=375, h=320; fully collapsed x=0, y=620, w=375, h=100; expanded/search x=0, y=68, w=375, h=652
layout.dragHandle: x=16, y=12, w=343, h=4; visible bar 44x4 centered
layout.collapsed: BottomSheetCollapsed keeps DragHandle and Form.Select visible; list content is clipped by the 100px sheet height; footer is not rendered.
layout.searchOwnedBy: mobile.search-overlay; keep Form.SearchBar outside BottomSheet even when sheet is collapsed or hidden by marker detail.

layout.search: x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36 across default, bottomSheetCollapsed, markerSelected, bottomSheetExpanded, and searchFocused states
layout.parent: MapCollectionModal overlay; do not render inside the 100px bottomSheetCollapsed container or inside any BottomSheet content clip.
layout.visibility: visible in observed mobile states including markerSelected and bottomSheetCollapsed; focused visual state follows Form.SearchBar active/filled variants.

regions.purpose: Mobile SearchBar overlay fixed within MapCollectionModal across mobile states. It is not a child of BottomSheet.
Scrollable mobile category and marker filter list. Shares data and selection state with desktop left-panel.controls.

layout.list: x=16, y=82, w=343, h=604 inside BottomSheet
layout.childIndent: use tokenized 32px left padding for child rows
layout.collapsed: In bottomSheetCollapsed state, SheetItemList may remain in the node tree at x=16,y=82,w=343,h=604 but must be clipped by BottomSheet h=100 and should not be interactable until reopened.

regions.purpose: Mobile clear/filter action area fixed to the bottom of the modal.

layout.visibility: visible in default and expanded sheet states; hidden in bottomSheetCollapsed, markerSelected, and searchFocused observed states.

regions.purpose: Mobile selected-marker detail surface shown in MobileMapMarkerSelectedScreen. It replaces the desktop fixed lower-right detail card and hides the bottom sheet while open.

layout.markerSelected: DescribeCard x=16, y=602, w=343, h=86 inside MapCollectionModal
layout.visibility: render only when a marker is selected; hide BottomSheet while this detail card is open; closing the detail card restores the previous BottomSheet state.

requiredRendererBehavior: Reject unknown region ids.
Reject components not listed in the target region's allowedComponents.
Reject arbitrary HTML or arbitrary component code in AI output.
Map canvas content should support pan/drag and mouse-wheel zoom in the renderer/layout layer.
Map background/content scales with zoom; MapTip markers keep a constant visual size while their positions are recalculated from map coordinates.
MapTip markers must render below Map.PopupDescribeCard when overlapping.
Map.PopupDescribeCard title and close button must align on the same visual row when image and description are absent.
When the pointer is inside map.canvas, canvas drag and wheel zoom should prevent native image dragging and prevent the surrounding page from scrolling.
Do not render development-only counters or status text in final generated pages. Preview-only marker count text such as shown/total markers is not part of the Figma map template.
Bottom action button clears search text and all active filter selections.
Allow data-bound values only after datasource schema and mapping exist.
On mobile, render bottom-sheet controls instead of the desktop left sidebar.
On mobile, keep BottomSheet list scrolling independent from map pan/zoom gestures.
On mobile, share search, filter, selected map, selected marker, and clear-all state with the desktop model.
Use semantic tokens from design-system-pack/tokens.css; do not hardcode colors when a token exists.
Mobile selected-marker state may render the selected MapTip marker at 40x46 while default markers remain 32x38.
Mobile selected-marker state renders Map.PopupDescribeCard at x=16, y=602, w=343, h=86, hides BottomSheet while open, and omits the desktop fixed detail position.
Mobile expanded and search-focused states move BottomSheet to x=0, y=68, w=375, h=652.
Mobile search-focused state may omit the bottom footer action while the focused search state is active.
Mobile is a tap-first adaptation of the PC interaction model; do not invent hover-only or unknown mobile actions.
Mobile bottomSheetCollapsed state uses BottomSheet x=0, y=620, w=375, h=100; keep handle/select visible, clip list content, and hide the footer action.
Mobile selected-marker state hides BottomSheet and renders only the selected marker detail card; closing the detail card restores the previous BottomSheet state.
Mobile SearchBar belongs to mobile.search-overlay and must not be nested inside BottomSheet; keep x=16,y=52,w=343,h=36 across all observed mobile states.
